description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly black body accented by orange and blue components. The main receiver and barrel are constructed from a matte black material, with a cylindrical suppressor attached to the muzzle. The rifle is equipped with a prominent pistol grip and a fixed, skeletonized stock that extends rearward in a curved fashion. Underneath the receiver, a blue drum magazine is visible, suggesting high-capacity ammunition storage. The top of the rifle includes a raised sighting system, and the overall build appears robust and suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern black rifle with orange and blue accents, featuring a suppressor, drum magazine, and skeletonized stock.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suppressor, blue drum magazine beneath, and the narrow profile of the sight and stock.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the rifle, orange grip, blue drum magazine, and curved skeletonized stock.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the end of the stock, pistol grip, and the alignment of the sight and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the suppressor, drum magazine, and the overall tactical structure of the rifle.
